name: Optional as Homebrew
author: GrayPockets
bootlegger: Placid Poppy Grower optional rule is in effect.
BFF Ogre optional rule is in effect.
Chaos Hatter optional rule is in effect.
Fae Pit-Hag optional rule is in effect.
Dread Wraith optional rule is in effect.
Relay Hindu optional rule is in effect.

name: Poppy Grower*
firstNightReminder: Skip Minion Info and Demon Info. Wake the Demon. Show the *THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY* token. Show 3 not-in-play good character tokens.
otherNightReminder: If the Poppy Grower died today, became drunk, poisoned, or left play tonight, wake all Minions. Show the *THIS IS THE DEMON* token. Point to the Demon. Put the Minions to sleep. Wake the Demon. Show the *THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS* token. Point to the Minions.
ability: Minions & Demons do not know each other. If you die, become drunk, poisoned, or leave play, they learn who each other are that night.
flavor: In the hidden groves of the deep forest, the black poppy dwells. To see its revelry is to be enchanted. To smell its thick aroma is to be lost forever, a slave to the gods of light and dark.

name: Ogre*
otherNightReminder: If the player marked *FRIEND* changes character, the Ogre does too.
ability: On your 1st night, choose a player (not yourself): you always have the same alignment as them (you don't know which) even if drunk or poisoned.

name: Hatter*
otherNightReminder: If the Hatter died, wake the Minions & Demons. Each may choose a new Minion or Demon character. If they do, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token.
ability: If you died today or tonight, the Minion & Demon players may choose new Minion & Demon characters to be. The Demon may become a Minion & a Minion may become the Demon.
flavor: One Hat. Too Hat. Three Hat. Tea Hat. Fore Hat. Thrive Hat. Six Hat. Sticks Hat.

name: Pit-Hag*
otherNightReminder: The Pit-Hag chooses a player & a non-Traveller character. If they chose a character that is not in play: Put the Pit-Hag to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token.
ability: Each night*, choose a player & a character they become (if not in play). If a Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary. If a Traveller will stay until the end of the game, the Pit-Hag may change them into a non-Traveller.
flavor: Round about the cauldron go; In the poison'd entrails throw; Toad, that under cold stone; Days and nights has thirty-one; Sweated venom sleeping got; Boil thou first in the charmed pot.

jinxes.reason: If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Cult Leader, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If a Pit-Hag creates a Damsel, the Storyteller chooses which player it is.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Goon, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Ogre, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Politician, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If there is a spare token, the Pit-Hag can create an extra Village Idiot. If so, the drunk Village Idiot might change.

name: Wraith*
firstNightReminder: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players wake.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players wake.
ability: You may choose to open your eyes at night. You wake when other evil players do. Once per game, a player that is mad that you are the Wraith, dies.
flavor: Ra'āb ina pān ṣilli ša dāri. Rigim qallu ina šūri, šītu ša šunātīka iredde, u napšutka idlul ina pān maṣṣartī dāriti.

name: Hindu*
ability: The first 4 players to die are immediately reincarnated as Travellers of the same alignment. If the Demon becomes a Traveller, a Minion becomes the Demon.
flavor: चत्वारो मृत्युमध्ये पतन्ति, चत्वारो यात्री पुनरुद्गताः। चत्वारो धर्मे स्थितचित्तवृत्तेः, चत्वार एषां न पुनः क्षयः॥
